title: pimpinella tenera
intro: Pimpinella tenera, also known as Chinese burnet or young burnet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pimpinella tenera include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Pimpinella tenera can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, making it accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
